summary: Action checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (critical: violates GitHub Actions hardening requirements). Script has likely bug in include-new logic: fails to detect items with properties not in dimensions (nested loop doesn't check all item properties). Repetitive patterns appear 3+ times: list creation, property-name extraction (@(...PSObject.Properties...)). Complex exclude/exclude-count logic lacks explanatory comments. No helper functions despite scattered duplicated concerns. Risky to modify safely.
